text_block_list.name: Refreshed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Aaah, now that hits the spot! No lunch<n>is
complete without some melon soda!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Melon soda?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One early afternoon in the cafeteria, I<n>spot Satono
Diamond looking very<n>interested in the melon
soda offered in<n>the soda fountain.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll give it a taste as well. ♪ This<n>should be
melon soda, I presume?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She produces a teacup and gets<n>ready to
dispense some soda into it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes? Is something the matter?
choice_data_list: Are you really gonna drink it out of a teacup?
Are you really gonna drink it out of a teacup?
Is this your first time trying melon soda?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes? Is something the matter?
choice_data_list: Are you really gonna drink it out of a teacup?
Are you really gonna drink it out of a teacup?
Is this your first time trying melon soda?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Well, yes... Oh, is this not the correct<n>way to do it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Do you mind telling me the proper<n>procedure? I
just love experiencing<n>new things!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I explain to Satono Diamond that<n>usually people
drink melon soda out of<n>a glass. However...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, now I understand!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll ask Father to borrow some of his<n>
crystalware, then.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Why yes. It's a wonderfully exquisite<n>collection
he bought overseas.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the melon soda will just<n>look
extravagant in it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, is that no good either?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Satono Diamond really is on a whole<n>other level...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It is! Hee hee! I'm getting so excited<n>just looking
at it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
By the way, just how much melon is<n>in this
melon soda?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That can't be an odd question... Afterall, it's called melon soda,correct?
choice_data_list:
Well, it's kind of like how melon bread also
doesn't—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Melon bread?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh my word! Whatever is that? Is it<n>bread filled to
the grain with melons?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm talking to a being raised<n>on another
planet. Nothing gets<n>through to Satono Diamond
no matter<n>how I try to explain things.
